property: Property 2: Preservation - Healthy Grid Behavior and Non-Bug Inputs

observations.generated_domain: DOGE/WIF healthy maker BUY then SELL; fill quantity equals configured quantity; interior adjacent levels; profitable fees
observations.baseline: BUY -> adjacent higher POST_ONLY SELL; SELL -> adjacent lower POST_ONLY BUY; exact fill quantity; VWAP/position/PnL/counters and level occupancy updated once
observations.comparator: Exact symbol, side, adjacent level price, quantity, POST_ONLY, position, average entry, realized PnL and counters

observations.generated_domain: Bot-namespaced open DOGE order with exact decimal deviation in [0, 0.02] on either side of a fresh reference
observations.baseline: Ticker and pending-order reads only; zero cancel and zero replacement requests, including exactly 2%
observations.comparator: Exact ownership fixture, symbol and zero mutation count

observations.generated_domain: Healthy DOGE/WIF prices and positive USDT balances with two BUY slots per symbol
observations.baseline: Reserve 5%, divide remaining quote balance equally over all BUY slots, derive per-symbol quantity, retain two BUY/two SELL directions per symbol
observations.comparator: Exact symbol/side/POST_ONLY and equivalent per-symbol quantity plus BUY quote-risk total after any mandatory lot normalization

observations.generated_domain: Minimum/interior/maximum volatility classes and bidirectional one-step Grid Drift with non-zero position/PnL
observations.baseline: Symmetric old 3%-8% half-width clamp with monotonic volatility class; drift shifts range without changing Position, AvgEntryPrice, RealizedPnL, TotalBuys or TotalSells
observations.comparator: Normalize only approved old/new clamp values by volatility class; exact direction, symmetry, range width and GridState/PnL

observations.generated_domain: One pg-v1 bot-namespaced historical order and no unowned orders
observations.baseline: Exactly the owned order is cancelled before the first new-grid placement
observations.comparator: Exact ownership identity, symbol, cancel count and cleanup-before-place ordering

observations.generated_domain: Fresh valid DOGE/WIF ticker decimals, sizes, volume, timestamp offsets within four seconds and arbitrary increasing sequence; paired six-second stale replay
observations.baseline: Exact parse and synchronous dispatch; six-second-old ticker rejected with symbol-scoped DATA_INVALID evidence
observations.comparator: Exact symbol, all price/size/volume decimals, sequence and dispatch count; stale remains rejected

observations.generated_domain: Ascending grid levels around an exact current level, positive quantities, profitable BUY fills and SELL counter-BUY risk boundary
observations.baseline: Below=current BUY, above=current SELL, current omitted, all POST_ONLY; profitable adjacent counter allowed; position-limit excess rejected and equality allowed
observations.comparator: Exact symbol, side, level price, quantity, POST_ONLY, profitability result and risk decision

observations.generated_domain: DOGE/WIF orders, positions and grid strategy JSON with exact decimal quantity, average entry, unrealized/realized PnL in a t.TempDir SQLite database
observations.baseline: Logical fields survive close/reopen round trip exactly for both symbols
observations.comparator: Exact order identity/status/side/symbol/price/quantity, position/average/PnL and strategy state; additional durability rows do not participate

observations.generated_domain: Healthy DOGE BUY fill interleaved before or after a simulator-local WIF counter rejection
observations.baseline: DOGE emits the same adjacent POST_ONLY SELL with exact symbol, price and quantity as DOGE-only execution
observations.comparator: Exact healthy-peer output; no WIF bug-condition behavior is accepted as baseline

observations.generated_domain: DOGE/WIF preservation profile with an explicitly empty mean_reversion_configs sequence plus both mean-reversion production source files
observations.baseline: No mean-reversion config is loaded; source SHA-256 values remain unchanged
observations.comparator: Exact empty activation set and exact production source hashes

observations.generated_domain: Synthetic 32+ character credential-shaped values through info/warn/error/trade/local-alert paths and credentials loaded only from controlled environment variables
observations.baseline: No raw synthetic secret appears; fixed mask appears; symbol/BUY/quantity remain observable; controlled values load unchanged
observations.comparator: Exact absence of raw value and preservation of non-sensitive trading fields

observations.generated_domain: Read-only API entry points over an in-memory transport and static audit of every Property 2 test/fixture
observations.baseline: Zero external DNS, dial, production request, real credential use, real order mutation or approval action
observations.comparator: All production-effect counters remain exactly zero and every endpoint remains in-memory or literal loopback
